name: Ayush Singh
role: Building reliable distributed systems, streaming data infrastructure, and backend platforms.
academic: Final-year Computer Science student passionate about Distributed Systems • Backend Engineering • Data Infrastructure

lines: I enjoy designing systems that continue to work under failure.
I turn ideas into production-grade systems.

about_me.text: I build systems that are reliable, scalable and observable. My interests lie in distributed systems, streaming pipelines, backend platforms and automation.
about_me.exploring: System Design, Cloud, and High Performance Systems
about_me.fun_fact: I drink coffee and write code. Repeat.

what_i_build.title: Distributed Systems
what_i_build.desc: Message brokers, ordering, consensus, concurrency, persistence, fault tolerance

what_i_build.title: Streaming Infra
what_i_build.desc: Kafka, Spark, Airflow, ETL/ELT, real-time ingestion, data pipelines

what_i_build.title: Backend Platforms
what_i_build.desc: APIs, microservices, storage, caching, auth, rate limiting

what_i_build.title: Reliability Eng.
what_i_build.desc: Retries, DLQ, chaos testing, load testing, monitoring, alerts, observability

featured_projects.name: Market Stream Ingestion Engine
featured_projects.desc: Real-time market data ingestion using Kafka, Spark Structured Streaming & Airflow with schema validation, DLQ and sub-200ms latency.

featured_projects.name: Go Distributed Message Broker
featured_projects.desc: High-performance message broker in Go with per-key ordering, persistence, consumer groups, acks & exactly-once semantics (simulated).

featured_projects.name: Notification Queue Service
featured_projects.desc: Reliable notification delivery with retries, scheduling, priority queues, idempotency keys and Dead Letter Queue.

featured_projects.name: Endpoint Observability Platform
featured_projects.desc: Real-time endpoint monitoring with Prometheus, Grafana, FastAPI and React dashboard for metrics, alerts and failure analytics.
